description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a pastel yellow front, accented by a pink frame and a large, rectangular display screen. The control panel sits below the screen and includes a joystick and two buttons, with a coin slot and access panel beneath. The side panels are decorated with vibrant, stylized graphics featuring a cityscape, green and white diagonal stripes, and a central character or object in red and white. The top of the cabinet has a marquee area with a white background and faint text or artwork, bordered in pink. The back of the cabinet is solid black, likely for maintenance access, and the overall build appears sturdy and designed for public use in arcades or entertainment venues.
description: A pastel yellow and pink upright arcade game cabinet with a large screen, control panel, coin slot, and colorful side graphics featuring a cityscape and character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pastel yellow face, large display screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and coin slot below.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vibrant side panel graphics with a cityscape, diagonal stripes, and a central red and white figure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black panel, likely for maintenance access, with no visible graphics or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with matching colorful graphics and the same cityscape and character motif.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, large and slightly curved with a visible bezel, typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons, spaced apart on a flat panel with a simple color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, with a white background and faint, possibly stylized text or artwork, bordered in pink; overall theme is subtle and pastel.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Colorful, stylized graphics featuring a cityscape, diagonal green and white stripes, and a central red and white character or object.
